title: agrostis longifolia
intro: Agrostis longifolia, also known as ticklegrass or bent grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Agrostis longifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall gastrointestinal health.
